mapper.sql: select vocab_id, unit_id, word, language, pronunciation, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentences, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from edu_vocabulary where del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select vocab_id, unit_id, word, language, pronunciation, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentences, create_by, create_time from edu_vocabulary where del_flag = '0'
AND word LIKE CONCAT('%', #{word}, '%')
AND FIND_IN_SET(unit_id, #{unitIds})
AND unit_id = #{unitId}
order by create_time desc
mapper.delete: delete from edu_vocabulary where del_flag = '0' and vocab_id in ( select v.vocab_id from edu_vocabulary v join edu_course_unit u on v.unit_id = u.unit_id join edu_course c on u.course_id = c.course_id where v.language != c.language )
mapper.insert: insert into edu_vocabulary ( unit_id, word, language, pronunciation, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentences, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{unitId}, #{word}, #{language}, #{pronunciation}, #{partOfSpeech}, #{definition}, #{exampleSentences}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), '0' )
mapper.delete: update edu_vocabulary set del_flag = '1' where vocab_id = #{vocabId}

update edu_vocabulary set del_flag = '1' where vocab_id in
#{vocabId}
